name: Apple-Pecan Pound Cake
recipeIngredient: 3 cups Granny Smith apple, peeled and finely diced
recipeInstructions:
Any tart cooking apples may be used.
Mix sugar and oil, add eggs and beat well. Combine flour, baking soda, and salt. Add the flour mixture to the beaten egg mixture. Stir in vanilla, apples, coconut, and pecans. Mix well. Pour butter into a greased tube pan. Bake at 325°F for 1 hour and 20 minutes. Allow cake to cool to room temperature before removing from pan.
